title: Spec/implementation reconciliation: link, SCHC, RPL, SenML documents contradict each other and the code
description: The spec corpus contradicts itself and the (mutually-consistent) implementations in ~15 places. Children per document area. Each item needs a human ruling: fix the spec OR fix the code (if code, all three implementations in lockstep + new vectors). Until resolved, implementers porting from spec text will produce non-interoperable nodes.
